questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Concurrency Anomalies?
options: Inefficient scaling of Dirty reads, non-repeatable reads, phantom reads, and write skew anomalies.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Dirty reads, non-repeatable reads, phantom reads, and write skew anomalies.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Dirty reads, non-repeatable reads, phantom reads, and write skew anomalies scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
